response.justification: Maria is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 18 years of hands-on experience, entrepreneurial drive (founded GISCollective), and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and her background shows no recognized AI/ML expertise, no shipped AI-powered products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of operating at principal/director scope — influencing org-wide technical strategy, advising strategic customers, or leading cloud platform direction. The gap between senior IC delivery work and the strategic, externally-facing leadership this role demands is substantial.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise (no AI products, publications, or platform leadership)
Career trajectory is senior IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or engineering leadership at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategic scope
Long, diverse engineering experience with entrepreneurial initiative
